title: Research Network | Ying-Fan Lin
h1: A public network built through explicit, mutual confirmation.

cards.text:
RESEARCH NETWORK
A public network built through explicit, mutual confirmation.

This registry identifies research groups that have agreed to describe a shared topic in public. A listing records a connection between independent sites; it does not imply employment, supervision, endorsement, or ownership of another group's work.

CONFIRMED REGISTRY
Each node states its scope and ownership boundary.

1 site-owned node

SITE OWNER
Lin Groundwater Hydraulics Group

Chung Yuan Christian University

CONFIRMED TOPICS
Aquifer-test interpretation
Transformation uncertainty
Groundwater-influenced subsurface energy
OWNERSHIP

This node represents Ying-Fan Lin's own research website and the work presented here.

OWNERSHIP

This node represents Ying-Fan Lin's own research website and the work presented here.

Current site →

OPEN BY AGREEMENT
External nodes are added by mutual confirmation.

The registry does not infer a relationship from co-authorship, conference contact, institutional proximity, or a shared research topic. A group appears only after both sides have explicitly agreed to a public listing and confirmed the wording of the shared topic and ownership note.

Discuss a confirmed connection →

No external research groups are listed yet.

Lin Groundwater Hydraulics Group

Analytical models, field interpretation, and decision-focused uncertainty checks for aquifer tests, recovery records, TRT, and subsurface energy questions.
